name: google-sheets
title: Google Sheets MCP Server
description: List, read, and write Google Sheets data via the Sheets API v4 and Drive API v3.

toolDetails.name: sheets_list_spreadsheets
toolDetails.description: List accessible Google Sheets spreadsheets via the Google Drive API.

toolDetails.name: sheets_get_values
toolDetails.description: Read a cell range from a Google Sheets spreadsheet using A1 notation.

toolDetails.name: sheets_update_values
toolDetails.description: Overwrite a cell range in a Google Sheets spreadsheet using A1 notation.

toolDetails.name: sheets_append_values
toolDetails.description: Append rows to a Google Sheets spreadsheet after the existing data.

toolDetails.name: sheets_get_metadata
toolDetails.description: Fetch a spreadsheet's title and per-sheet dimensions (rows, columns).
